title: Teacher from i got reincarnated as a sword
description: Adds Teacher, the intelligent sword from Reincarnated as a Sword, with animated eyes and CIT support
body:
# 🗡️ Teacher (Reincarnated as a Sword)

Bring **Teacher** to life in Minecraft!

## How to Obtain
Rename any **axe** or **sword** to **`Teacher`** and the model will apply automatically.

## ✨ Features
- **Animated eyes** (they blink and move)
  
  ![Eyes Blinking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d96be35c0d5d1509f2c568c9f2a86a2f8e977cac.gif)

## ✅ Requirements
- **Forge:** OptiFine
- **Fabric:** CIT Resewn

> You need **OptiFine (Forge)** *or* **CIT Resewn (Fabric)** for the custom item texture to work.

## 📦 Compatibility
- Works on axes and swords
- Designed for resource-pack CIT naming
- Multiplayer-friendly (client-side)

---

Enjoy wielding the spirit of **Teacher**!
